#1 JUDGE: DONNA LITTLE; S.SAWYER/CSR; GVANHEST/CLERK. CAUSE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. COUNSEL ARNOLD EVJE II PRESENT ON BEHALF OF THE PLTF. DEFTS PRESENT IN PRO PER. CASE SETTLED AND A JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION HAS BEEN READ INTO THE RECORD AND SIGNED BY THE DEFTS IN COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BORGHI, TAVIA LAUGHON, LISA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 118 TAYLOR ST #211, S.F., STAYED UNTIL AUG-05-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, 5PM. PLTF WAIVES BACK RENT AND DAMAGES UNLESS DEFTS FAIL TO VACATE. NO FURTHER STAYS!! MUTUAL RELEASE OF ANY AND ALL CLAIMS. PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT DEEMED ABANDONED. NO ONE ELSE HAS RIGHT TO CLAIM POSSESSION. SECURITY DEPOSIT, IF ANY, DECLARED FORFEITED. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
